title: FluoMALDI Microscopy: Matrix Co-Crystallization Simultaneously Enhances Fluorescence and MALDI Imaging.
author: Yang E Shen XE West-Foyle H Hahm TH Siegler MA Brown DR Johnson CC Kim JH Roker LA Tressler CM Barman I Kuo SC Glunde K
content: S-EPMC10724403 PMC10724403 FluoMALDI Microscopy: Matrix Co-Crystallization Simultaneously Enhances Fluorescence and MALDI Imaging.
